name: Potato Bread Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 1/2 loaf White Bread, cut into cubes and dried
recipeInstructions:
Mary Anderson O'Brien, born in Ireland and raised in Lynn, Massachusetts, made this stuffing for her family throughout her life. Her daughter-in-law, Bobbie O'Brien, has prepared it since marrying into the family 38 years ago. "We all love it," she said. "I've experimented with other stuffings, but I'm through experimenting."
1. Cook and mash the potatoes using 4 tablespoons of butter.
2. Season with 2 tablespoons of poultry seasoning.
3. Add chopped onions and celery, mixing well.
4. Incorporate the bread cubes, remaining 2 tablespoons of butter, and eggs.
5. Stir until thoroughly mixed and season with salt and pepper. Add at least 1 tablespoon of poultry seasoning.
6. If needed, moisten further with stock.
7. Let sit for a few hours before stuffing into a bird weighing 12-15 pounds.
